zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Ashton於1342年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，他的父親Sir John de Ashton II2歲，母親Lady Anne de Standish-6歲。他於1389年與Jane Savile在英國英格蘭越可爾坦可斯利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1412年登記服兵役。他去世於1428年9月3日在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Ashton于1342年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，他的父亲Sir John de Ashton II2岁，母亲Lady Anne de Standish-6岁。他于1389年与Jane Savile在英国英格兰越可爾坦可斯利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1412年登记服兵役。他去世于1428年9月3日在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Ashton was born in 1342, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John de Ashton II, was 2 and his mother, Lady Anne de Standish, was -6. He married Jane Savile in 1389, in Tankersley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1412. He died on 3 September 1428, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, at the age of 86.

Il a épousé Jane Savile en 1389, à Tankersley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1412. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1428, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ko.Of, Ashton-Under-Lyne, Lancashire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: John de Ashton(이)가 1342년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Ashton II(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne de Standish(은)는 -6세였다. 그는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 탠커슬리에서 Jane Savile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1428년 9월 3일 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ashton nasceu em 1342, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Ashton II, tinha 2 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne de Standish, tinha -6 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Savile em 1389, em Tankersley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1412. ru.Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England: аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Ashton родился в 1342 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Ashton II было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne de Standish, -6. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Savile в 1389 г. в местности танкирсли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1412 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 3 сентября 1428 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Ashton nació en 1342, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Ashton II, tenía 2 años y su mamá, Lady Anne de Standish, tenía -6 años. Se casó con Jane Savile en 1389, en Tankersley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1412. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1428, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
